steps.title: Identify the signal in context
steps.content: The passage presents "producing acclaimed works" as the means by which Jonah Park establishes his place in the literary tradition. This phrase signals positive achievement—something that would naturally make one's position secure and firm.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the signal
steps.content:
The blank needs a verb meaning "to firmly establish" — by producing acclaimed works, Park has earned/established his place in the tradition. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — ‘contemplated’: thought about; you contemplate ideas, not your literary placement. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘subverted’: undermined; this would mean Park is challenging the tradition, but he is JOINING it through acclaimed work. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘solidified’: firmly established; acclaimed works confirm and strengthen Park's place in the tradition. ✓
  • Choice D — ‘extricated’: removed from; Park isn't leaving the tradition, he's joining it. ✗
That confirms C is correct.
